title: No Content-Type check: card fetcher parses non-HTML responses as HTML
description: fetch_card() sends Accept: text/html but never checks the response Content-Type header. If the URL points to an image, PDF, binary file, or JSON API, the response bytes are passed to parse_og_tags() which will find no meta tags and return an empty/garbage card (empty title, no image). This wastes a DB row and may produce a card with url but no useful metadata. Fix: check Content-Type starts with text/html (or application/xhtml+xml) before parsing; otherwise bail early.
